code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    let n = parts.len()
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(p)
        match string.parse_int(p)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut cur = 0
    mut j = 0
    let m = nums.len()
    while j < m
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          cur = v
        else if v > cur
          cur = v
        end
        result = list.push(result, cur)
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut k = 0
    let r = result.len()
    while k < r
      match result.get(k)
      when Some(v)
        if k == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
